rationale: C22 ghost code recovered: status files claimed dashboard and radial upgrades but code was never committed. All changes were in working tree only. This cycle committed them properly with 3 critical bug fixes discovered during review: (1) dashboard read meta.factions instead of meta.faction_rep — bars always zero, (2) maturity calc read meta.oghams.owned instead of state.oghams.skills_unlocked — oghams always zero so maturity score wrong, (3) _update_dashboard() had 0 params but reputation_changed signal emits 3 — runtime crash on rep change. Major UX unlock: players can now select any of 8 biomes (with maturity gates) instead of being locked to Broceliande.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C23: verify BiomeRadial maturity formula with real store data (test edge: starter biome always unlocked at maturity=0, iles_mystiques locked until 75). Verify dashboard reads correct values on real game launch. Test radial open/close animation with 8 icons spacing. Then feature: wire DayNightManager tint into BiomeRadial background (radial should reflect time of day like HubAntre does). Consider adding biome-specific SFX on hover.
